SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

THIS SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT is made on the 15th day of April, 2023.

BETWEEN:

1. Mr. John Tan, holder of NRIC No. S7654321Z, residing at 123 Orchard Road, #04-56, Singapore 238888, phone: +65 9123 4567, email: john.tan@example.sg

2. Dr. Emily Wong, holder of NRIC No. S8765432D, residing at 456 Clementi Avenue, #02-34, Singapore 120456, phone: +65 9876 5432, email: emily.wong@healthcare.sg

3. Tech Innovators Pte. Ltd., UEN: 201123456A, having its registered office at 789 Raffles Place, #10-11, Singapore 048621, phone: +65 6789 0123, email: contact@techinnovators.sg

WHEREAS the parties agree to invest an initial sum of SGD 500,000 into Future Vision Ltd., UEN: T23LL0001K, with the intention of establishing a joint venture.
